one_word_sub.question: Something that is dull and lacking in ideas or intelligence

words.sentence: The celebrity's ______ remarks added nothing to the debate on climate change.
words.example_sentence_hi: फिल्म की नीरस कहानी ने उन आलोचकों को निराश किया जो गहराई की उम्मीद कर रहे थे।

words.meaning_en: Regard with great respect and reverence
words.example_sentence: In Indian culture, elders are venerated as sources of wisdom.

one_word_sub.question: To regard someone or something with deep respect and reverence

words.meaning_en: Using or expressed in more words than are needed

one_word_sub.question: A style of speaking or writing that uses too many words

words.sentence: The ______ instructions confused more than they helped.
words.example_sentence_hi: उसकी शब्दाडंबरी लेखन शैली ने रिपोर्ट को अनावश्यक रूप से लंबा बना दिया।

one_word_sub.question: A person who seeks revenge and wants to harm those who wronged them

words.meaning_en: Feeling or showing caution about possible dangers or problems

words.meaning_en: A person who is fanatical and uncompromising in pursuit of their beliefs

idioms.example_sentence: She was burning the midnight oil to finish her project before the deadline.
